definitions: high-stakes：高风险的；赌注很高的；成败攸关的

examples.text: each of whom carries a signature playing card corresponding to their role. You’ve received intel from a 100% reliable source about how they operate. Their M.O. is to invite their victims to a high stakes game with one or more killers at the table. The game is a variant of poker played with a single, fair deck
examples.explanation: 这里的 high stakes game 指“高赌注的游戏”或“风险极高的对局”。high-stakes 用来强调这场游戏一旦输掉，后果会很严重，成败代价很大。

source.text: Can you solve the secret assassin society riddle? - Alex Rosenthal
